headline: AIHA Announces Star Sponsors for AIHA Connect 2026 Conference
summary: FALLS CHURCH, Va., May 19, 2026--AIHA has announced this year’s star sponsors of its annual conference, AIHA Connect: Amazon, DuPont, SGS North America, TSI, Assay Technology, SKC, and VelocityEHS. AIHA Connect 2026 will be held June 1–3 at the Ernest N. Morial Convention Center in New Orleans, with a live-streamed virtual component. Star sponsors have increased opportunities to interact with occupational and environmental health and safety professionals from every sector of industry.
